questionHtml: The potential energy profile for a reaction is shown. Sketch a dotted line labelled “Catalysed” to indicate the effect of a catalyst.
markschemeHtml:
lower activation energy curve between same reactant and product levels ✓


Accept curve with or without an intermediate.

Accept a horizontal straight line below current line with the activation energy with catalyst/Ecat clearly labelled.

meta.title: The potential energy profile for a reaction is shown. Sketch a dotted line labelled “Catalysed” to indicate the effect of a catalyst.
